question: What day of the month is shown in the date text on the podium sign in the final clip?

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man in a dark suit and a woman in a light blue jacket walk together before standing at a white podium displaying German and US flags. The podium sign reads "Besuch in Krün - Visit to Krün" while the man speaks into microphones. Audience members wearing traditional Bavarian hats and vests sit at tables with blue and white checkered cloths, clapping and holding beer mugs.

Describe the sequence of actions performed by the man in the dark suit and the woman in the light green jacket from the beginning of the video until the man speaks at the podium.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a dark suit and a woman in a light green jacket walk forward; at 2s, they proceed side-by-side past seated crowds; at 8s, the man stands behind a white podium displaying flags; at 10s, the man speaks into microphones while the woman stands to his right.

canonical_answer: They drink beer from large glass mugs and eat large pretzels.
